name: Plantation Pecan Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Dark corn or cane syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, beat the eggs.
3. Stir in the syrup, sugar, butter, and vanilla.
4. Stir in the pecans.
5. Pour into the crust.
6. Bake, uncovered, for 35 to 40 minutes or until a knife inserted about 1-1/2 inches from the edge comes out clean.
7. Cool on a wire rack.
